title: pavonia revoluta
intro: Pavonia revoluta, also known as Rock Rose or Mexican Rose Mallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia revoluta include relief from skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to treat fever and respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use by making a tea from its leaves and flowers, or by using it as a topical application in the form of a salve or ointment.
